title: Hacquetia epipactis
taxonomy: Hacquetia epipactis is a flowering plant species within the family Apiaceae. It is native to mountainous regions in Eastern Europe and Asia. The plant is typically classified as a perennial herb with a unique growth habit. It belongs to the order Apiales and the family Apiaceae, which includes many species of carrots, parsley, and other umbelliferous plants.
